steps.title: Identify the form of the function
steps.content: The function $f(x)=4{,}000(0.75)^x$ has the exponential form $a\cdot b^x$, where $a$ is the initial value and $b$ is the decay factor. Here $x$ counts years after 2012.

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 0
steps.content: At $x=0$ (the year 2012): $f(0)=4{,}000(0.75)^0=4{,}000\cdot 1=4{,}000$. So 4,000 represents the starting population in 2012.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• A) Initial population in 2012 - matches $f(0)=4{,}000$. Correct.
  • B) Population 7 years after 2012 - that would be $f(7)=4{,}000(0.75)^7\approx 534$, not 4,000.
  • C) Percent decrease each year - that comes from $1-0.75=0.25$, i.e. 25%, not 4,000.
  • D) Percent decrease every 7 years - again a percentage from the base 0.75, not 4,000.
That matches Choice A — The estimated initial beetle population for this species and area in $2012$- A.
